value: AMD optimization: Best params MACD(18/37/5), RSI(15/70/20), metric=sharpe. Sharpe=1.78, Return=217%, MaxDD=-26%. AMD benefits from faster MACD (responsive to semiconductor cycles). Major improvement from previous Sharpe=0.86.

feature-selection-regression-results-2026-03-15: Regression test reg_20260315_071349 (34min, 265 windows, 7d step, 11 parallel processes). Best features by marginal IC: Bollinger +0.0576, OBV +0.0508, MACD +0.0086. Neutral/hurt: valuation, RSI, ATR, ADX, gap, momentum, mean_reversion. Final Rank IC=0.52 (baseline 0.41). Sharpe ~-0.10 throughout — strong signal but negative returns, likely portfolio construction issue.

sharpe-normalization-bug-fix: Aggregate Sharpe showed -0.10 (total_return=-1.0, vol=9.79) despite per-window Sharpe mean=1.73. Root cause: _calculate_portfolio_returns didn't normalize by total_weight. With 265 overlapping walk-forward windows (7d step, 6mo test), each business day had positions from ~130 windows, creating ~130x effective leverage. Fix: port_ret /= total_weight after the position loop. Per-window metrics were correct because single-window calls had total_weight≈1.0.

SLV silver optimization: Best params MACD(5/59/5), RSI(13/80/39), metric=sharpe_dd. Sharpe=2.47, Return=407%, MaxDD=-12%. Silver strongly prefers very slow MACD (trend-following). Consistent across all optimization runs.

walk-forward-step-7d: Changed backtest step from 1d to 7d (config.yaml step_value=7). Reduces windows ~7x (1849→265) with minimal accuracy loss for 6-month test windows. Combined with 11-core multiprocessing, full regression drops from ~20h to ~2.5h. GPU not worth it for this workload (small window sizes). Revert to step=1 only for final production validation.
